entities.name: CELERY
entities.description: Apium graveolens L., a globally grown vegetable with a genome of 3.33 Gb

entities.name: APIACEAE
entities.description: The plant family to which celery belongs

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCE ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The process of creating a high-quality genome sequence anchored to 11 chromosomes

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: Structural units of the genome; celery has 11

entities.name: REPETITIVE SEQUENCES
entities.description: Genomic sequences that repeat, composing 92.91% of the celery genome

entities.name: ANNOTATED GENES
entities.description: The 31,326 genes identified and described within the celery genome

entities.name: LONG-TERMINAL REPEATS
entities.description: Shared repetitive sequences in Apiaceae plants suggesting inter-specific exchanges

entities.name: POLYPLOIDIZATIONS
entities.description: Ancestral genome doubling events inferred in Apiales and Apiaceae

entities.name: APIALES
entities.description: The botanical order containing the Apiaceae family and other related taxa

entities.name: EUDICOT COMMON ANCESTOR
entities.description: The ancestral plant from which Apiales evolutionary trajectories were reconstructed

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: Sequencing of RNA from roots, leaves, and petioles to identify key genes

entities.name: ANTHOCYANIN BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological pathway regulating the production of anthocyanin pigments

entities.name: COUMARIN BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological pathway regulating the production of coumarin compounds

entities.name: NBS DISEASE-RESISTANT GENES
entities.description: A class of genes involved in biotic defense, found to be significantly reduced in celery and Apiales

entities.name: BIOTIC DEFENCE MECHANISMS
entities.description: The systems used by plants to defend against biological pathogens

entities.name: COUMARINS
entities.description: Chemical compounds that produce distinctive odours and are linked to plant defense

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING AND ANNOTATION
entities.description: The process of determining the DNA sequence and identifying gene functions for breeding and research

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMIC ANALYSES
entities.description: The analysis of genomes across different taxa within the Apiales order
